top_signals.title: Electric Vehicle Maker Rivian Offers to Sell 75 Million Shares
top_signals.summary: Rivian Automotive Inc. is offering to sell 75 million shares as the electric vehicle company seeks to fund equity contributions related to a US Department of Energy loan.
